CLI_DESC: Punkito Tabs Oracle - Advanced audio separation and transcription engine for bassists.
STATUS_LOAD_MODEL: [*] Initializing neural weights for U-Net stem separation...
STATUS_DSP_START: [*] Computing spectrogram representations and running pYIN tracking...
STATUS_TAB_GEN: [*] Resolving physical hand constraints to build optimal tablature...
ERROR_FILE_NOT_FOUND: [-] Critical error: Audio file '{}' does not exist.
ERROR_INVALID_EXTENSION: [-] Critical error: File extension '{}' is invalid. Supported formats: {}.

SUCCESS_PIPELINE: [+] Source separation and transcription completed successfully.
